title: Youtube Poop: How to Handception
description:
A tribute vid to my fans and especially markcrilley in a form of a remix of one of his vids (and its the first remix of his how to draw videos!) and I hope you all enjoy it! 
Original vid here: http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=lbViuspmeGc
markcrilley's channel: http://www.youtube.com/user/markcrilley?feature=watch
